{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2002
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2002
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 22 - May 15
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
|runner-up       = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense (DF)]]
|matches         = 117
|goals           = 369
|top goal scorer = [[Deivid]] (13)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2001 Copa do Brasil|2001]]
|nextseason      = [[2003 Copa do Brasil|2003]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2002''' was the 14th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on February 13, 2002 and concluded on May 15, 2002 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Serejão|Boca do Jacaré]] in [[Taguatinga, Federal District|Taguatinga]] in the [[Federal District (Brazil)|Federal District]], in which [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] lifted the trophy for the second time after a 1–1 draw with [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]].

==Knockout round==
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n

| RD1= First round
| RD2= Second round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = Atlético-RR
| RD1-team02 = Paysandu-PA
| RD1-score01-1 = 0
| RD1-score02-1 = 1
| RD1-score01-2 = 0
| RD1-score02-2 = 3

| RD1-team03 = Sampaio Corrêa-MA
| RD1-team04 = [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]
| RD1-score03-1 = 2
| RD1-score04-1 = 1
| RD1-score03-2 = 1
| RD1-score04-2 = 5

| RD1-team05 = [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]-PR
| RD1-team06 = [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]-SP
| RD1-score05-1 = 2
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 1
| RD1-score06-2 = 4

| RD1-team07 = Anapolina-GO
| RD1-team08 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]-RS
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 3
| RD1-score07-2 =
| RD1-score08-2 =

| RD1-team09 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]-PE
| RD1-team10 = Remo-PA
| RD1-score09-1 = 2
| RD1-score10-1 = 2
| RD1-score09-2 = 4
| RD1-score10-2 = 3

| RD1-team11 = Vasco da Gama-AC
| RD1-team12 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score11-1 = 2
| RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 = 0
| RD1-score12-2 = 1

| RD1-team13 = Juazeiro-BA
| RD1-team14 = Confiança-SE
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 = 1
| RD1-score14-2 = 4

| RD1-team15 = ASA-AL ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-team16 = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]-SP
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 0
| RD1-score15-2 = 1
| RD1-score16-2 = 2

| RD2-team01 = Paysandu-PA
| RD2-team02 = [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]-RJ
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 2
| RD2-score01-2 = 0
| RD2-score02-2 = 2

| RD2-team03 = [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]-SP
| RD2-team04 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]-RS
| RD2-score03-1 = 0
| RD2-score04-1 = 2
| RD2-score03-2 = 1
| RD2-score04-2 = 0

| RD2-team05 = [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]-PE
| RD2-team06 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF
| RD2-score05-1 = 2
| RD2-score06-1 = 3
| RD2-score05-2 = 0
| RD2-score06-2 = 0

| RD2-team07 = Confiança-SE
| RD2-team08 = ASA-AL
| RD2-score07-1 = 1
| RD2-score08-1 = 2
| RD2-score07-2 = 4
| RD2-score08-2 = 0

| RD3-team01 = [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]-RJ
| RD3-team02 = [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]-RS
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 1 
| RD3-score01-2 = 2
| RD3-score02-2 = 1

| RD3-team03 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF
| RD3-team04 = Confiança-SE
| RD3-score03-1 = 0
| RD3-score04-1 = 0
| RD3-score03-2 = 4
| RD3-score04-2 = 1

| RD4-team01 = [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]-RJ
| RD4-team02 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF
| RD4-score01-1 = 0
| RD4-score02-1 = 1 
| RD4-score01-2 = 0
| RD4-score02-2 = 1
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n

| RD1= First round
| RD2= Second round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = São Raimundo-AM
| RD1-team02 = [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América-RN]]
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 1
| RD1-score01-2 = 0
| RD1-score02-2 = 4

| RD1-team03 = Corinthians-RN
| RD1-team04 = Bahia-BA
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 2
| RD1-score03-2 =
| RD1-score04-2 =

| RD1-team05 = [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]-SC
| RD1-team06 = [[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama]]-DF
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 0
| RD1-score05-2 = 2
| RD1-score06-2 = 1

| RD1-team07 = Palmas-TO
| RD1-team08 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]-SP
| RD1-score07-1 = 0
| RD1-score08-1 = 1
| RD1-score07-2 = 2
| RD1-score08-2 = 5

| RD1-team09 = Comercial-MS
| RD1-team10 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]-RS
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 1
| RD1-score09-2 = 0
| RD1-score10-2 = 2

| RD1-team11 = Ji-Paraná-RO
| RD1-team12 = [[Santos FC|Santos]]-SP
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 0
| RD1-score11-2 = 2
| RD1-score12-2 = 4

| RD1-team13 = Botafogo-SP
| RD1-team14 = [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]-PE
| RD1-score13-1 = 1
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 = 2
| RD1-score14-2 = 7

| RD1-team15 = Juventude-MS
| RD1-team16 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD1-score15-1 = 2
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 = 0
| RD1-score16-2 = 2

| RD2-team01 = [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América-RN]]
| RD2-team02 = Bahia-BA
| RD2-score01-1 = 0
| RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = 0
| RD2-score02-2 = 3

| RD2-team03 = [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]-SC
| RD2-team04 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]-SP ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score03-1 = 3
| RD2-score04-1 = 2
| RD2-score03-2 = 0
| RD2-score04-2 = 1

| RD2-team05 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]-RS
| RD2-team06 = [[Santos FC|Santos]]-SP
| RD2-score05-1 = 3
| RD2-score06-1 = 3
| RD2-score05-2 = 1
| RD2-score06-2 = 0

| RD2-team07 = [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]-PE
| RD2-team08 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD2-score07-1 = 2
| RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 0
| RD2-score08-2 = 3

| RD3-team01 = Bahia-BA
| RD3-team02 = [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]-SP
| RD3-score01-1 = 3
| RD3-score02-1 = 0 
| RD3-score01-2 = 2
| RD3-score02-2 = 2

| RD3-team03 = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]-RS
| RD3-team04 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD3-score03-1 = 0
| RD3-score04-1 = 2
| RD3-score03-2 = 3
| RD3-score04-2 = 2

| RD4-team01 = Bahia-BA
| RD4-team02 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD4-score01-1 = 2
| RD4-score02-1 = 1 
| RD4-score01-2 = 3
| RD4-score02-2 = 4
}}


{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n

| RD1= First round
| RD2= Second round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = Botafogo-PB
| RD1-team02 = [[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]-SC
| RD1-score01-1 = 1
| RD1-score02-1 = 3
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =

| RD1-team03 = CENE-MS
| RD1-team04 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]-BA
| RD1-score03-1 = 0
| RD1-score04-1 = 0
| RD1-score03-2 = 0
| RD1-score04-2 = 6

| RD1-team05 = Independente-AP
| RD1-team06 = Flamengo-PI
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 1
| RD1-score05-2 = 0
| RD1-score06-2 = 1

| RD1-team07 = Treze-PB
| RD1-team08 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 0
| RD1-score07-2 = 1
| RD1-score08-2 = 4

| RD1-team09 = Moto Club-MA
| RD1-team10 = CSA-AL
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 2
| RD1-score09-2 = 0
| RD1-score10-2 = 2

| RD1-team11 = Rio Negro-AM
| RD1-team12 = [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]-CE
| RD1-score11-1 = 0
| RD1-score12-1 = 1
| RD1-score11-2 = 0
| RD1-score12-2 = 2

| RD1-team13 = [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]-PE
| RD1-team14 = Caxias-RS
| RD1-score13-1 = 3
| RD1-score14-1 = 1
| RD1-score13-2 =
| RD1-score14-2 =

| RD1-team15 = Sergipe-SE
| RD1-team16 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 1
| RD1-score15-2 = 1
| RD1-score16-2 = 2

| RD2-team01 = [[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]-SC
| RD2-team02 = [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]-BA
| RD2-score01-1 = 3
| RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = 3
| RD2-score02-2 = 3

| RD2-team03 = Flamengo-PI
| RD2-team04 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD2-score03-1 = 0
| RD2-score04-1 = 5
| RD2-score03-2 =
| RD2-score04-2 =

| RD2-team05 = CSA-AL
| RD2-team06 = [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]-CE
| RD2-score05-1 = 0
| RD2-score06-1 = 0
| RD2-score05-2 = 3
| RD2-score06-2 = 2

| RD2-team07 = [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]-PE
| RD2-team08 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD2-score07-1 = 1
| RD2-score08-1 = 2
| RD2-score07-2 = 3
| RD2-score08-2 = 3

| RD3-team01 = [[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]-SC
| RD3-team02 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD3-score01-1 = 3
| RD3-score02-1 = 1 
| RD3-score01-2 = 1
| RD3-score02-2 = 6

| RD3-team03 = CSA-AL
| RD3-team04 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD3-score03-1 = 2
| RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 0
| RD3-score04-2 = 4

| RD4-team01 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD4-team02 = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]-RJ
| RD4-score01-1 = 4
| RD4-score02-1 = 0 
| RD4-score01-2 = 0
| RD4-score02-2 = 1
}}

{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n

| RD1= First round
| RD2= Second round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals

| RD1-team01 = Vila Nova-GO
| RD1-team02 = [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]-CE
| RD1-score01-1 = 2
| RD1-score02-1 = 4
| RD1-score01-2 =
| RD1-score02-2 =

| RD1-team03 = Alegrense-ES
| RD1-team04 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]-RJ ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score03-1 = 2
| RD1-score04-1 = 2
| RD1-score03-2 = 0
| RD1-score04-2 = 0

| RD1-team05 = Bragantino-SP
| RD1-team06 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD1-score05-1 = 1
| RD1-score06-1 = 3
| RD1-score05-2 =
| RD1-score06-2 =

| RD1-team07 = América-MG
| RD1-team08 = Guarani-SP
| RD1-score07-1 = 1
| RD1-score08-1 = 2
| RD1-score07-2 = 1
| RD1-score08-2 = 2

| RD1-team09 = Bandeirante-DF
| RD1-team10 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG
| RD1-score09-1 = 1
| RD1-score10-1 = 4
| RD1-score09-2 =
| RD1-score10-2 =

| RD1-team11 = Londrina-PR
| RD1-team12 = [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]-GO
| RD1-score11-1 = 4
| RD1-score12-1 = 4
| RD1-score11-2 = 2
| RD1-score12-2 = 1

| RD1-team13 = Americano-RJ
| RD1-team14 = Joinville-SC
| RD1-score13-1 = 3
| RD1-score14-1 = 0
| RD1-score13-2 = 1
| RD1-score14-2 = 3

| RD1-team15 = River-PI
| RD1-team16 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD1-score15-1 = 1
| RD1-score16-1 = 2
| RD1-score15-2 = 0
| RD1-score16-2 = 2

| RD2-team01 = [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]-CE
| RD2-team02 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]-RJ
| RD2-score01-1 = 1
| RD2-score02-1 = 2
| RD2-score01-2 = 1
| RD2-score02-2 = 3

| RD2-team03 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD2-team04 = Guarani-SP
| RD2-score03-1 = 2
| RD2-score04-1 = 0
| RD2-score03-2 = 1
| RD2-score04-2 = 1

| RD2-team05 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG
| RD2-team06 = Londrina-PR
| RD2-score05-1 = 0
| RD2-score06-1 = 1
| RD2-score05-2 = 2
| RD2-score06-2 = 0

| RD2-team07 = Americano-RJ
| RD2-team08 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD2-score07-1 = 2
| RD2-score08-1 = 6
| RD2-score07-2 =
| RD2-score08-2 =

| RD3-team01 = [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]-RJ
| RD3-team02 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD3-score01-1 = 1
| RD3-score02-1 = 3 
| RD3-score01-2 = 1
| RD3-score02-2 = 1

| RD3-team03 = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]-MG
| RD3-team04 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD3-score03-1 = 2
| RD3-score04-1 = 2
| RD3-score03-2 = 2
| RD3-score04-2 = 3

| RD4-team01 = [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]-PR
| RD4-team02 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD4-score01-1 = 1
| RD4-score02-1 = 3
| RD4-score01-2 = 1
| RD4-score02-2 = 0
}}

==Final phase==

{{4TeamBracket-2legs

| RD1= Semifinals
| RD2= Finals

| RD1-team1 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF
| RD1-team2 = [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD1-score1-1 = 3
| RD1-score2-1 = 0
| RD1-score1-2 = 2
| RD1-score2-2 = 1

| RD1-team3 = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]-SP
| RD1-team4 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD1-score3-1 = 0
| RD1-score4-1 = 2
| RD1-score3-2 = 2
| RD1-score4-2 = 1

| RD2-team1 = [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]-DF
| RD2-team2 = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP
| RD2-score1-1 =1
| RD2-score1-2 =1
| RD2-score1-A =2
| RD2-score2-1 =2
| RD2-score2-2 =1
| RD2-score2-A =3
}}

==Champion==
{{winners||Copa do Brasil 2002|[[Image:Bandeira do Estado de São Paulo.svg|100px]]<br>[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]-SP|Second}}

==External links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20060503080651/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2002.htm Copa do Brasil 2002 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2002}}
[[Category:2002 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2002]]
[[Category:2002 in Brazilian football]]
